sizing_rule.note: Risk max 2% per trade (max_loss_per_trade_percent). Position sizing enforced via predetermined stop mechanisms (volatility-based ATR multiplier 1.0, MAE 3%, channel lookback 10 periods) established at entry to limit drawdown exposure in volatile/illiquid conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should establish multiple protective stop mechanisms at entry—such as volatility stops, MAE stops, or channel-based stops—rather than relying on periodic portfolio reassessment alone, to avoid serious drawdowns in volatile or illiquid positions.
